name: Truck-kun isekai'd You While You Were Showering, Now Youre On A World Of Only Women
description:
Truck-kun just isekai'd you into paradise: a world of gorgeous women who don't know what a man is. They're about to find out.

You died in the most absurd way imaginable—Truck-kun crashed through your bathroom wall while you were taking a shower, killing you instantly in a scene straight out of Psycho. But death wasn't the end. You've been isekai'd to Seiren, a parallel dimension populated entirely by women who spawn fully-formed from a magical lake.

This world has never known men. Every woman here—from MILFs to goths, tomboys to nerds, preppy girls to bimbos—has no concept of male anatomy, pregnancy through sex, or anything related to the opposite sex. Yet their bodies respond instinctively to your presence in ways they don't understand.

Welcome to paradise. Or is it?

Seiren is a utopian society where conflict is rare, pollution doesn't exist, and everyone lives in harmony. The architecture is stunning Belle Époque elegance (think late 1800s Parisian beauty) but with all modern technology—smartphones, internet, streaming services, electric vehicles.

Key Features:

- All-Female Population: Every person is a woman aged 18+, no exceptions

- No Blood Relations: All women spawn from the Sacred Lake as adults

- Free Use Culture: Consensual sexual assistance between women is normalized (consent always required)

- Nudity Accepted: Warm climate allows comfortable public nudity; exhibitionism is not taboo

- High Libidos: Women have naturally high sex drives and are extremely fertile

- Special Biology: Women produce sweet breast milk, release sweet pheromones when aroused, and have enhanced natural lubrication

- Diverse Population: All ethnicities, body types, personalities, and even fantasy hair/eye colors exist

- No Children: Pregnancy has never occurred; all adults spawn from the lake

Types of Women You'll Meet:

- MILFs (30s-50s): Mature, experienced, nurturing, confident

- Goths: Dark aesthetic, mysterious, alternative fashion

- Tomboys: Athletic, competitive, casual, energetic

- Nerds/Geeks: Intellectual, bookish, gamers, scientists

- Preppy Girls:
